intent_graph.goal: Deploy a new Blueprint on Render by connecting a repository and initiating the deployment process.

steps.intent: Initiate the creation of a new resource by clicking the 'New' button.
steps.verification_anchor: Presence of 'New' button on the dashboard homepage.

steps.intent: Navigate to the Blueprint creation section by selecting the 'Blueprint' option.
steps.verification_anchor: Confirmation of navigation to the Blueprint selection page.

steps.intent: Connect a repository by clicking the 'Connect' button to link version control.
steps.verification_anchor: Appearance of repository selection or input field.

steps.intent: Focus on the input field to prepare for entering repository details.
steps.verification_anchor: Input field is highlighted or cursor is blinking.

steps.intent: Provide the repository URL or identifier to specify the source for the Blueprint.
steps.verification_anchor: Text appears in the input field as expected.

steps.intent: Submit the form to deploy the Blueprint by clicking 'Deploy Blueprint'.
steps.verification_anchor: Redirection to deployment progress or confirmation page.

decision_points.description: User must choose between 'Blueprint' or other resource types (e.g., Web Service, Static Site).
User may need to authenticate or select a repository provider (e.g., GitHub, GitLab).
User must ensure the correct repository URL or identifier is entered to avoid deployment errors.

expected_end_state.description: The Blueprint deployment process is initiated, and the user is redirected to a page showing deployment status or confirmation of the Blueprint being created.

steps.selector: label:has-text("Projects Search CTRL + K K") + button
label:has-text("M My Workspace New Blueprint Search CTRL + K K New Upgrade K") + button
